title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Suhana Safar
subTitle: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the US to meet the poet Ujjwala. There, she meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but he decides to help her meet Ujjwala.

title: Aapas Ki Baat
subTitle: Kajal and Anand's love story is cut short after Kajal's family disapproves of their relationship. Years later, fate brings them back into each other's lives, but all is not as it seems.

title: Babu
subTitle: Owing a debt of gratitude, a good-hearted rickshaw puller dedicates his time and earnings to a mother-daughter duo who has fallen on tough times.

title: Bade Dil Wala
subTitle: After losing his daughter Juhi in a train accident, Sinha meets her husband Vijay and makes him his heir. Later, a doctor shows up with an amnesiac Juhi and a dark secret about Vijay.

title: Dushman Duniya ka
subTitle: Mahesh, a man of integrity, discovers his son Lucky's drug use with dismay. However, though Lucky vows to quit, circumstances cause him to relapse.

title: The Don
subTitle: A mysterious person vigilantly protects Vijay and his mother from notorious goons. His reasons for protecting them remain an unreolsved enigma.

title: Brahmachari
subTitle: Brahmachari faces a predicament after he falls in love with a woman whom he promised to help her reunite the man she loved.

title: Mera Desh Mera Dharam
subTitle: Sajid, the son of an army officer, joins an armed freedom struggle in a bid to liberate the Bangladeshi populace from the oppressive Pakistani regime. However, his personal life faces turmoil.

title: Mera Desh Mera Dharam
subTitle: Sajid, the son of an army officer, joins an armed freedom struggle in a bid to liberate the Bangladeshi populace from the oppressive Pakistani regime. However, his personal life faces turmoil.

title: The Don
subTitle: A mysterious person vigilantly protects Vijay and his mother from notorious goons. His reasons for protecting them remain an unreolsved enigma.

title: BadKaar
subTitle: Mini, a young woman, is kidnapped from a pub and police investigate the case. However, when her sister sets out to find her, she uncovers a criminal nexus which shakes the city.

title: Bhagwan Parshuram
subTitle: Lord Parshuram, a reincarnation of Lord Vishnu, is dedicated to restoring peace and faces many challenges along the way.

title: Dushman Duniya ka
subTitle: Mahesh, a man of integrity, discovers his son Lucky's drug use with dismay. However, though Lucky vows to quit, circumstances cause him to relapse.

title: Brahmachari
subTitle: Brahmachari faces a predicament after he falls in love with a woman whom he promised to help her reunite the man she loved.

title: Khoon Ka Karz
subTitle: Karan, Kishan and Arjun are brought up in an orphanage. Later, they get pulled into the underworld of crime, however, unexpected truths force them to change paths.

title: Heeralal Pannalal
subTitle: Heeralal and Pannalal are twins who face humorous situations when they are mistaken for another set of twins with the same name. Unaware of their namesakes, they set out on a journey of love and adventure.

title: Guddu
subTitle: Fate plays a cruel game with Salina and Guddu, testing their bond and threatening to tear their lives apart with tragedy and terminal illness.

title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Heeralal Pannalal
subTitle: Heeralal and Pannalal are twins who face humorous situations when they are mistaken for another set of twins with the same name. Unaware of their namesakes, they set out on a journey of love and adventure.

title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Khoon Ka Karz
subTitle: Karan, Kishan and Arjun are brought up in an orphanage. Later, they get pulled into the underworld of crime, however, unexpected truths force them to change paths.

title: Guddu
subTitle: Fate plays a cruel game with Salina and Guddu, testing their bond and threatening to tear their lives apart with tragedy and terminal illness.

title: Rakhwale
subTitle: Upon getting falsely incriminated for a murder, a man flees from prison. So, while trying to collect evidence and prove his innocence, he meets people who willingly help him.

title: Train to Pakistan
subTitle: A small Punjab community deals with high political and ethnic tensions in the wake of India's independence from Britain.

title: Chhoti Si Baat
subTitle: Arun, a timorous man, falls for Prabha but is reluctant to express his feelings. However, things take a turn when Nagesh attempts to woo Prabha.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Kumar, who lives in Africa, keeps getting dreams of a railway station called Viran Nagar. When he arrives in India, the villagers believe him to be a ghost and share an unsettling tale.

title: Gaban
subTitle: Ramanath, the unemployed son of an honest clerk, gets arrested for embezzlement and faces prison time. The only way he can set himself free is to testify against freedom fighters.
